homepage.heroSubline: Durable concrete solutions built to last. Serving Bakersfield and surrounding areas with unwavering commitment.
aboutText: De Marco Concrete started with a simple mission: provide Bakersfield with honest, reliable concrete services. We're a family-owned business, and our roots run deep in this community.

We believe in doing things the right way, every time. That means using quality materials, employing skilled craftsmen, and communicating openly with our clients. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and attention to detail.
Bakersfield is our home, and we're committed to making it a better place. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact on Kern County.

valueProps.title: Proven Expertise
valueProps.description: Years of experience delivering exceptional concrete work in Kern County.

valueProps.title: Unwavering Quality
valueProps.description: We use only the highest-grade materials and proven techniques.

valueProps.title: Transparent Communication
valueProps.description: We keep you informed every step of the way, from estimate to completion.

valueProps.title: Local Commitment
valueProps.description: Dedicated to serving Bakersfield and surrounding communities with integrity.

homepage.ctaSubline: Start your project with a solid foundation. Contact De Marco Concrete today!

services.name: Concrete Driveways
services.shortDescription: Durable and aesthetically pleasing driveways built for Bakersfield homes.
services.description: De Marco Concrete specializes in crafting concrete driveways that stand up to Bakersfield's harsh climate. From initial design and excavation to precise pouring and finishing, we handle every aspect of your driveway project. We understand the importance of proper drainage to prevent water damage, especially with occasional heavy rains. We offer a variety of finishes, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and traditional broom finishes, to complement your home's architecture. Our driveways are built to withstand heavy use and the weight of multiple vehicles, ensuring a long-lasting and attractive addition to your property. We also handle driveway repairs and replacements, addressing cracks, potholes, and other damage to restore your driveway's integrity and curb appeal. We obtain all necessary permits to ensure compliance with local regulations.
process: Step 1: Site evaluation and design consultation

faq.question: How long will my new concrete driveway last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, a De Marco Concrete driveway can last 25-30 years or more. We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure longevity.

faq.question: What type of concrete finish is best for hot weather?
faq.answer: A broom finish is a popular choice in Bakersfield as it provides good traction and helps to dissipate heat. Stamped concrete can also be a good option if properly sealed and maintained.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a new driveway?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases a permit is required for new driveway installations. We will handle the permit application process for you.

services.name: Concrete Patios
services.shortDescription: Create the perfect outdoor living space with a custom concrete patio.
services.description: Transform your backyard into an inviting oasis with a custom concrete patio from De Marco Concrete. We design and build patios to suit your specific needs and lifestyle, whether you're looking for a simple and functional space or an elaborate outdoor entertainment area. We offer a wide range of design options, including stamped concrete, stained concrete, and decorative borders. We also consider factors like sun exposure and drainage to ensure your patio is comfortable and functional year-round. A well-designed concrete patio can significantly enhance your property value and provide a perfect space for relaxing, grilling, and entertaining guests. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design to final sealing, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience. We can also integrate features like fire pits, seating areas, and outdoor kitchens into your patio design.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and layout planning

faq.question: How much does a concrete patio cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a concrete patio depends on several factors, including size, design complexity, and finish. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate quote for your specific project.

faq.question: What is stamped concrete?
faq.answer: Stamped concrete is a decorative technique that involves imprinting patterns and textures onto freshly poured concrete to mimic the look of natural stone, brick, or other materials.

faq.question: How do I maintain my concrete patio?
faq.answer: Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and occasional resealing will help to keep your concrete patio looking its best. We can provide you with specific maintenance recommendations based on the type of finish you choose.

services.name: Concrete Foundations
services.shortDescription: Solid concrete foundations for homes and businesses in Bakersfield.
services.description: De Marco Concrete provides expert concrete foundation services for residential and commercial buildings in Bakersfield. We understand the importance of a strong and stable foundation, especially in an area prone to seismic activity. We adhere to strict building codes and use only the highest-quality materials to ensure your foundation is built to last. Our team has extensive experience pouring foundations for new construction, additions, and renovations. We also offer foundation repair services, addressing cracks, settling, and other issues that can compromise the structural integrity of your building. We work closely with engineers and architects to ensure your foundation meets all necessary specifications and provides a solid base for your project. Our attention to detail and commitment to quality ensure a foundation that will stand the test of time.

faq.question: How do I know if my foundation needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of foundation problems include cracks in walls or floors, doors and windows that stick, and uneven floors. If you notice any of these issues, it's important to have your foundation inspected by a professional.

faq.question: What type of concrete is used for foundations?
faq.answer: We use a high-strength concrete mix specifically designed for foundation applications. This mix is resistant to cracking, settling, and other forms of damage.

faq.question: How long does it take to pour a concrete foundation?
faq.answer: The time required to pour a concrete foundation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We will provide you with a realistic timeline during the initial consultation.

services.name: Concrete Slabs
services.shortDescription: Durable and versatile concrete slabs for various applications.
services.description: De Marco Concrete specializes in pouring high-quality concrete slabs for a wide range of applications, including garages, sheds, workshops, and commercial buildings. We understand the importance of proper preparation and reinforcement to ensure a level and durable slab that will withstand heavy use. We offer a variety of finishes, including smooth, broom, and textured, to suit your specific needs. Our team has extensive experience pouring slabs of all sizes and thicknesses, and we use only the highest-quality materials to ensure a long-lasting and reliable surface. Whether you need a slab for a new garage, a storage shed, or a commercial warehouse, De Marco Concrete has the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper drainage and preventing cracking or settling.

faq.question: How thick should a concrete slab be?
faq.answer: The thickness of a concrete slab depends on the intended use. For a garage or shed, a 4-inch slab is typically sufficient. For heavier loads, a thicker slab may be required.

faq.question: What type of reinforcement is used in concrete slabs?
faq.answer: We typically use rebar or wire mesh to reinforce concrete slabs. This helps to prevent cracking and increase the overall strength of the slab.

faq.question: How long does it take for a concrete slab to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete typically takes 28 days to fully cure. However, it can be used after 7 days, although it will not have reached its full strength.

services.name: Concrete Repairs
services.shortDescription: Expert concrete repair services to restore the integrity of your surfaces.
services.description: De Marco Concrete offers comprehensive concrete repair services to address cracks, spalling, and other damage to your existing concrete surfaces. We understand that damaged concrete can be unsightly and unsafe, and we're committed to providing prompt and effective repairs to restore the integrity of your property. Our team has extensive experience repairing a wide range of concrete problems, from minor cracks to major structural damage. We use the latest techniques and materials to ensure a lasting repair that blends seamlessly with the surrounding concrete. Whether you need to repair a driveway, patio, foundation, or slab, De Marco Concrete has the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We assess the damage, determine the cause, and implement the most appropriate repair solution to prevent further deterioration.

faq.question: What causes concrete to crack?
faq.answer: Concrete can crack for a variety of reasons, including shrinkage, expansion, settling, and overloading. Proper design and installation can help to minimize the risk of cracking.

faq.question: Can I repair a cracked concrete foundation myself?
faq.answer: While minor cracks can be repaired with DIY methods, more serious foundation cracks require professional attention. Improper repair can compromise the structural integrity of your foundation.

faq.question: How much does concrete repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of concrete repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of repair required. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate quote for your specific project.

services.name: Decorative Concrete
services.shortDescription: Elevate your space with beautiful and unique decorative concrete solutions.
services.description: De Marco Concrete transforms ordinary concrete into stunning works of art with our decorative concrete services. We specialize in stamped concrete, stained concrete, and other decorative finishes that add beauty and value to your property. Whether you're looking to create a unique patio, driveway, or walkway, we can help you achieve your vision. We offer a wide range of colors, patterns, and textures to choose from, allowing you to create a custom look that complements your home's architecture. Our team has extensive experience working with decorative concrete, and we use only the highest-quality materials to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful finish. We work closely with our clients to understand their needs and preferences, and we provide expert guidance throughout the design and installation process. Enhance your outdoor living space or add a touch of elegance to your interior with decorative concrete from De Marco Concrete.
process: Step 1: Design consultation and selection of finishes
Step 2: Surface preparation and application of decorative elements

faq.question: What is the difference between stamped and stained concrete?
faq.answer: Stamped concrete involves imprinting patterns and textures onto freshly poured concrete, while stained concrete involves applying a colored stain to existing concrete to enhance its appearance.

faq.question: How do I choose the right decorative concrete finish for my project?
faq.answer: We can help you choose the right decorative concrete finish based on your budget, design preferences, and the intended use of the surface.

faq.question: How do I maintain decorative concrete?
faq.answer: Decorative concrete should be cleaned regularly with a mild detergent and sealed periodically to protect it from damage and maintain its appearance.

serviceAreas.content:
De Marco Concrete is proud to serve the Bakersfield area, providing top-quality concrete services for residential and commercial clients. We understand the unique needs of Bakersfield residents and businesses, from durable driveways that can withstand the intense summer heat to foundations built to last. Our experienced team is committed to delivering exceptional results and exceeding your expectations, whether you need a new patio, a concrete repair, or a complete concrete installation.

We use only the highest quality materials and employ the latest techniques to ensure that your concrete project is completed efficiently and effectively. De Marco Concrete is dedicated to providing reliable and affordable concrete services to the Bakersfield community. We are fully licensed and insured, and we offer free estimates for all projects. Contact us today to discuss your concrete needs and let us help you create a beautiful and functional space.
serviceAreas.localContext: Bakersfield is a major agricultural hub in the southern San Joaquin Valley, known for its hot summers and growing economy.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: De Marco Concrete did an amazing job on our new driveway. They were professional, efficient, and the finished product looks fantastic. The crew was punctual and cleaned up everything after the job. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: We hired De Marco Concrete to pour a patio in our backyard. The team was great to work with, and the patio looks beautiful. There was a minor delay due to weather, but they communicated clearly and kept us informed. Overall, very satisfied.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: De Marco Concrete poured a slab for our new shed, and it's perfect. The slab is level and smooth, and the team was very professional. They paid attention to every detail. Will definitely use them again for future projects.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: We had some cracks in our foundation, and De Marco Concrete did a great job repairing them. They were thorough and explained the process clearly. The repairs seem solid, and we're confident that our foundation is now stable.

reviews.name: Ashley M.
reviews.text: De Marco Concrete transformed our backyard with a beautiful stamped concrete patio. The design is exactly what we wanted, and the workmanship is excellent. The only minor issue was the project took a little longer than expected.

reviews.name: Kevin R.
reviews.text: After years of dealing with a cracked and uneven driveway, we decided to replace it. De Marco Concrete was fantastic from start to finish. The demolition and removal were quick and efficient, and the new driveway is perfectly smooth. The team was professional and courteous, and the price was reasonable. I highly recommend them!
